title: Targeting the human gut microbiome: a comparative review of probiotics, prebiotics, synbiotics, and postbiotics
source: Sun et al., Journal of Advanced Research, 2025

L2: Comparative analysis of probiotics, prebiotics, synbiotics, and postbiotics for gut health modulation
Gut microbiome composition and systemic organ interactions determine therapeutic efficacy
L3: Critical comparative review of gut microbiome modulation strategies including probiotics, prebiotics, synbiotics, and postbiotics, examining mechanisms of action, clinical evidence, and therapeutic applications for gastrointestinal and systemic health
